==Key Clue Records==
Complete these Key Clues in [[Kemet]] for various rewards and to fully progress through the Realm.

==Sand Lord==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Approximate Strength
|-
|Conquer Carot
|Defeat [[Kemet Apostles#Eli Basha|Eli Basha]] in 3 turns or less
|4.84m
|-
|Conquer New Valley
|Defeat [[Kemet Apostles#Dromedary|Dromedary]] in 3 turns or less
|6.5m
|-
|Conquer Matruh
|Defeat [[Kemet Apostles#Desert Fox|Desert Fox]] in 3 turns or less
|8.8m
|-
|Conquer Asvan
|Defeat [[Kemet Apostles#Asvan Dam|Asvan Dam]] in 3 turns or less
|9.5m
|}

==Lion King's Sword==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +4h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|green|Exploration|Duckbill Axe}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|blue|Exploration|Guardian Longsword}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|purple|Exploration|Scimitar}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|orange|Exploration|Horse Helmet}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|red|Exploration|Lion King's Sword}}
|}

==Rich Kemetic Merchant==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +15k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Redeem all [[Kemet Cards#Tier 1 (white)|limited cards (white)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Kemet Cards#Tier 2 (green)|limited cards (green)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Kemet Cards#Tier 3 (blue)|limited cards (blue)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Kemet Cards#Tier 4 (purple)|limited cards (purple)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Kemet Cards#Tier 5 (orange)|limited cards (orange)]]
|}

==Time Traveler==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Master all [[Kemet INTEL#Kemetic INTEL|Kemetic INTEL]]
|-
|Master [[Kemet INTEL#The Black Book|The Black Book]]
|-
|Master [[Kemet INTEL#The Book of the Sun|The Book of the Sun]]
|}

==Eternity Tower==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Defend against 60 waves of enemies with the Pyramid
|-
|Defend against 90 waves of enemies with the Pyramid
|-
|Defend against 120 waves of enemies with the Pyramid
|}

==Kemetic Tourism Promotion==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Kemetic Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +60}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Reward
|-
|Antisepsis Ad (Gisa)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|-
|Fake Beard (Wig Ad (Reed Synai)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|-
|Suncreen Ad (South Synai)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|-
|Camel Farm Ad (North Synai)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|}

==Kemetic Treasure==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Kemetic Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent, +50}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!<nowiki>#</nowiki> of items found
!Rewards
|-
|Desert Horse Race (Gisa)
|3
|W-tads +200, Travel Speedup +1h
|-
|Stone Ring Ruins (Gisa)
|3
|W-tads +200, Mutant Cell +2,000
|-
|Priest's Gift (Suezy)
|2
|W-tads +200, Angel Cells +2,000
|-
|Hieroglyphs (North Synai)
|4
|W-tads +300, Stone +2,000
|-
|Secret of Ramesses (North Synai)
|4
|Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|Ship Wreck (Reed Sea)
|4
|W-tads +300, Mecha Cell +2,000
|-
|Snowflake Decoration (Reed Sea)
|2
|W-tads +200, Stone +2,000
|-
|Praise of Aten (South Synai)
|4
|W-tads +300, Offering Speedup +2h
|-
|MIL Academy Box (El Beherra)
|2
|W-tads +200, Wood +2,000
|-
|Archaeology Supplies (El Beherra)
|4
|W-tads +300, Wood +2,000
|-
|Hatshepsut's Mirror (Carot)
|4
|W-tads +300, Clone Speedup +2h
|-
|Pyramid Mural (Carot)
|3
|W-tads +200, Novice Scroll +10
|-
|Secret of Temple (New Valley)
|4
|W-tads +300, Purple Reagent +20
|-
|Oasis Fruit (New Valley)
|2
|W-tads +200, Zombie Cell +2,000
|-
|Thutmose's Collection (Matruh)
|4
|W-tads +300, Coating (Blue) +20
|-
|Edwin's Thesis (Matruh)
|3
|W-tads +200, Gene Speedup +2h
|-
|Akhensten's Mark (Asvan)
|4
|W-tads +300, Refine Speedup +2h
|-
|Oracle's Collection (Asvan)
|2
|W-tads +200, Demon Cell +2,000
|-
|Scarab Accessory (Alexandrea)
|3
|W-tads +200, Organ Slime +30
|-
|Secretary's Gift (Alexandrea)
|3
|W-tads +200, Offering Speedup +2h
|-
|Traveler's Bag (Xiosy)
|2
|W-tads +200, B-tads +5,000
|-
|Dusty Treasure Box (Xiosy)
|4
|W-tads +300, Refine Speedup +2h
|-
|Lost Supply Box (Thebesy)
|2
|W-tads +200, Organ Slime +30
|-
|Ruin Chest (Thebesy)
|4
|W-tads +300, Demon Cell +2,000
|-
|Vineyard Box (Momphis)
|2
|W-tads +200, Angel Cell +2,000
|-
|Pharaoh's Mask (Momphis)
|4
|W-tads +300, Travel Speedup +1h
|-
|Hieroglyphs Stele (Suezy)
|4
|W-tads +300, Stone +2,000
|-
|Tourist's Luggage (Minra)
|2
|W-tads +200, B-tads +5,000
|-
|Sacrificial Chest (Minra)
|4
|W-tads +300, Zombie Cell +2,000
|-
|Patterned Plate (Asyut)
|3
|W-tads +200, Purple Reagent +20
|-
|Imset Collection (Asyut)
|4
|W-tads +300, Mutant Cells +2,000
|-
|Hidden Wood Box (Sohaj)
|2
|W-tads +200, Mecha Cell +2,000
|-
|Hermit's Cave (Sohaj)
|4
|W-tads +300, Blue Coating +20
|-
|Duelist Chest (Qera)
|3
|W-tads +3, Gene Speedup +2h
|-
|Saint Verse (Quera)
|3
|W-tads +200, Clone Speedup +2h
|}

==Nile Laborer==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Wish Coin}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Reward
|-
|Karnak Obelisk Clue (Thebesy)
|CIV 14,950
|{{RewardIconWithText|Divine Order Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Ruler Walls Clue (Momphis)
|CIV 15,100
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +1000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Simbel Temple Clue (Xoisy)
|CIV 15,250
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +1000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Wonder Project==
'''Rewards:''' W-tads +200, Lottery Ticket +3
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Sea Dam Blueprint (Minra)
|CIV 15,400
|B-tads +1,500, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Solar Tower Blueprit (Qera)
|CIV 15,500
|Gene Speedup +30m, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Qattara Project Blueprint (Asyut)
|CIV 15,850
|
|}

==Mystery from Ancient Times==
'''Rewards:''' Organ Slime +100, [[Bewitching Eye]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Display 1 of
!Rewards
|-
|Spinx Mystery (Reed Sea)
|[[Mutant Fungus]], [[Mutant Enoki]]
|Fungus Chest +10, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Bennu Bird Mystery (Matruh)
|[[Golden Chariot]], [[Notre Dame Bell]], [[Bronze Shiva Statue]], [[Golden Trophy]], [[Houmuwu Ding]], [[The Thinker]]
|Novice Scroll +10, Meal Box Size +100, [[Kemet Pyramids#Modules|Spellbreak Crystal module]]
|-
|Mystery of Ammit (New Valley)
|[[Boy with Goose]], [[Charging Bull]], [[Mermaid Statue]]
|Organ Slime +20, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Sobek Mystery (El Beherra)
|[[Peacock Clock]] , [[Nesdac Bell]], [[Cuckoo Clock]], [[Atomic Clock]], [[Aztec Calendar]]
|Time Chest +10, Meal Box Size +100
|}

==Kemet Journey==
'''Rewards:''' {{Gearlink|purple|Material|Abyss Amulet}}, W-tads +100
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Quarry Guard (North Synai)
|FAME 13,800
|Stone +1,000, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|The Homeless (El Beherra)
|FAME 13,700
|Zombie Cell +500, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Temple Priest (New Valley)
|FAME 15,500
|Kemetic INTEL +500, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Strange Bruiser (Matruh)
|FAME 16,200
|Demon Cell +500, Meal Box Size +100
|}

==Gods Trial==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Incense}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Khepri Trial (North Synai)
|FAME 13,200
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Serket Trial (El Beherra)
|FAME 15,000
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Seshat Trial (New Valley)
|FAME 15,300
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Satet Trial (Matruh)
|FAME 15,500
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Taweret Trial (Asvan)
|FAME 15,700
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Mythical Technology==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Expert Scroll, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Minya's Gift (Minra)
|CIV 15,500
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Asjuta's Gift (Asyut)
|CIV 15,650
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Sohag's Gift (Sohaj)
|CIV 15,750
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Kena's Gift (Qera)
|CIV 15,950
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Papyrus Code==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Kemetic Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirement
!Reward
|-
|Strategic Diagram (Gisa)
|CIV 14,360
|Kemetic INTEL +500, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Treasure Map (Suzey)
|CIV 14,000
|Kemetic Teasure Map +5, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Contact Diagram (South Synai)
|CIV 14,450
|Kemetic INTEL +500, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Hideout Map (Carot)
|CIV 14,750
|Kemetic Treasure Map +5, Meal Box Size +100
|}

==Market Sourcing==
'''Rewards:''' Expert Scroll +20, Purple Reagent +30
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirement
!Rewards
|-
|Luxor Market (Reed Sea)
|TECH 14,250
|{{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +1}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Khalili Market (Carot)
|TECH 14,800
|{{Relink|Rosetta Tablet|purple}} +20, Meal Box Size +10
|-
|Asvan Market (Asvan)
|TECH 16,600
|{{RewardIconWithText|Blue Coating, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Treasure Hunt in the Oasis==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Golden Pickaxe, +3}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +2000}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirement
!Reward
|-
|North Merchant's Tracks (Alexandrea)
|TECH 14,100
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +1000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|East Merchant's Tracks (Xoisy)
|TECH 14,250
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +1500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|South Merchant's Tracks (Thebesy)
|TECH 15,200
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|West Merchant's Tracks (Momphis)
|TECH 15,350
|{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Blue HP}} {{Retext|Blue HP-Fungus|blue}} +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Temple of Sand==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +4h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Thief's Remains (Alexandrea)
|ART 14,850
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Cleric's Remains (Xoisy)
|ART 15,000
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Robber's Remains (Thebesy)
|ART 15,150
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}Demon Cell +500, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Traveler's Remains (Momphis)
|ART 15,300
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}, [[Kemet Pyramids#Modules|Super Pesticide module]]
|}

==Behind Prosperity==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Evolution Chest, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +4h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Robot's Remains (Minra)
|ART 15,450
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Convict's Remains (Asyut)
|ART 15,600
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Wrinkled Remains (Sohaj)
|ART 15,800
|{{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +20}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Burnt Remains (Qera)
|ART 15,900
|{{RewardIconWithText|Organ Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}, [[Kemet Pyramids#Modules|Acid Solution module]]
|}

==Protection of the Deceased==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Dendera Tablet|blue, +20}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +50}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Reward
|-
|Croc Statue (Gisa)
|FTH 13,980
|Purple Reagent +10, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Ram Statue (Suezy)
|FTH 13,950
|Fungus Chest +10, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Hippo Statue (South Synai)
|FTH 13,600
|Toner +10, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Cheetah Statue (Carot)
|FTH 14,700
|Soul Chest +10, Meal Box Size +100
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Kemet]]
